2604.26645.title: SciHorizon-DataEVA: An Agentic System for AI-Readiness Evaluation of Heterogeneous Scientific Data
2604.26645.paper_summary: AI-for-Science (AI4Science) is increasingly transforming scientific discovery by embedding machine learning models into prediction, simulation, and hypothesis generation workflows across domains. However, the effectiveness of these models is fundamentally constrained by the AI-readiness of scientific data, for which no scalable and systematic evaluation mechanism currently exists. In this work, we propose SciHorizon-DataEVA, a novel agentic system to scalable AI-readiness evaluation of heterogeneous scientific data. At the evaluation-criteria level, we introduce the Sci-TQA2 principles, which organize AI-readiness into four complementary dimensions: Governance Trustworthiness, Data Quality, AI Compatibility, and Scientific Adaptability. Each dimension is decomposed into measurable atomic elements that enable fine-grained and executable assessment. To operationalize these principles at scale, we develop Sci-TQA2-Eval, a hierarchical multi-agent evaluation approach orchestrated through a directed, cyclic workflow. Our Sci-TQA2-Eval dynamically constructs dataset-aware evaluation specifications by combining lightweight dataset profiling, applicability-aware metric activation, and knowledge-augmented planning grounded in domain constraints and dataset-paper signals. These specifications are executed through an adaptive, tool-centric evaluation mechanism with built-in verification and self-correction, enabling scalable and reliable assessment across heterogeneous scientific data. Extensive experiments on scientific datasets spanning multiple domains demonstrate the effectiveness and generality of SciHorizon-DataEVA for principled AI-readiness evaluation.
2604.26645.paper_summary_zh: AI-for-Science (AI4Science) 正在透過將機器學習模型嵌入預測、模擬和假設生成工作流程中，越來越多地改變科學發現。<lb/>然而，這些模型的有效性根本上受到科學數據的 AI 準備程度的限制，目前尚不存在可擴展和系統化的評估機制。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們提出了 SciHorizon-DataEVA，一個新穎的代理系統，用於異質科學數據的可擴展 AI 準備評估。<lb/>在評估標準層面上，我們引入了 Sci-TQA2 原則，將 AI 準備劃分為四個互補的維度：治理可信度、數據質量、AI 兼容性和科學適應性。<lb/>每個維度被分解為可測量的原子元素，從而實現細緻且可執行的評估。<lb/>為了在規模上實現這些原則，我們開發了 Sci-TQA2-Eval，一種通過有向循環工作流程協調的分層多代理評估方法。<lb/>我們的 Sci-TQA2-Eval 通過結合輕量級數據集剖析、適用性感知的度量激活和基於領域約束及數據集-論文信號的知識增強規劃，動態構建數據集感知的評估規範。<lb/>這些規範通過具有內建驗證和自我修正的自適應工具中心評估機制執行，使得在異質科學數據上能夠進行可擴展和可靠的評估。<lb/>在跨多個領域的科學數據集上進行的廣泛實驗展示了 SciHorizon-DataEVA 在原則性 AI 準備評估中的有效性和普遍性。
2604.26645.author: Dianyu Liu et.al.
2604.26645.authors: Dianyu Liu, Chuan Qin, Xi Chen, Xiaohan Li, Wenxi Xu, Yuyang Wang, Xin Chen, Yuanchun Zhou, Hengshu Zhu
